title: Device Home Screen - Charge Case battery charging icon
scenario: Charge case battery icon charging sign appears and disappears correctly when charger is plugged in and unplugged on Device Home Screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
3. Ensure the charge case is opened with both earbuds inside and no charger connected.
4. Observe the battery icon for the charge case on the Home screen.
5. Plug a charger into the charge case.
6. Observe the battery icon for the charge case on the Home screen.
7. Unplug the charger from the charge case.
8. Observe the battery icon for the charge case on the Home screen.
expected: 1. When the charge case is opened with both earbuds inside and no charger connected, the battery icon should show no charging sign. 2. When a charger is plugged into the charge case, the battery icon should display a charging sign. 3. When the charger is unplugged, the charging sign should disappear.
